learning_objectives: Explain the frequency-dependent mediator differences in electroacupuncture: 2 Hz stimulates enkephalin/beta-endorphin; 100 Hz stimulates dynorphin
Describe the adipokine mechanism by which obesity amplifies OA pain beyond mechanical load reduction
Apply the COAST staging framework to guide non-pharmacological treatment selection and escalation
Identify photobiomodulation contraindications including active neoplasia
Use force plate gait analysis as an objective outcome measure for non-pharmacological interventions
Recognize the clinical threshold at which non-pharmacological management alone becomes a standard-of-care failure
Integrate non-pharmacological modalities with pharmacological management in a mechanistically coherent multimodal plan
high_priority_objectives: Identify photobiomodulation contraindications including active neoplasia
Recognize the clinical threshold at which non-pharmacological management alone becomes a standard-of-care failure
mastery_threshold_note: Fellows must demonstrate safety awareness and escalation thresholds, not only knowledge of modality mechanisms. Presenting all non-pharmacological modalities as universally safe and sufficient indicates insufficient mastery.
